title: Red Bauble Garland 2m – Christmas Garland with 20 Glitter Baubles & 19 Beads on Organza Ribbon – Festive Decoration for Mantels, Bannisters & Windowsills
features: Festive Christmas Garland – Features 20 sparkling red glitter baubles and 19 glossy beads.
Elegant Ribbon Finish – Strung across a matching red organza ribbon for a coordinated festive look.
Versatile Decoration – Perfect for decorating bannisters, fireplaces, windowsills, tables, and Christmas displays.
Generous Length – Measures 2m long with baubles at 3cm and beads at 1cm for balanced festive style.
Reusable Seasonal Décor – Lightweight and easy to attach, ideal for use year after year.
description: Add festive sparkle to your home with this Red Bauble Garland 2m. Designed with 20 glittering red baubles (3cm dia) and 19 matching beads (1cm dia), all strung along a red organza ribbon, it’s a stylish decoration for the holiday season. Perfect for draping across bannisters, fireplaces, windowsills, or tables, this lightweight garland brings instant Christmas charm to any space. At 2m long, it’s the ideal size for both large and small displays. Reusable year after year, this red Christmas garland is a simple yet elegant way to enhance your festive décor.
